nasb.text: For Moses writes that the man who practices the righteousness which is based on law shall live by that righteousness.

esv.text: For Moses writes about the righteousness that is based on the law, that the person who does the commandments shall live by them.

cnv.text: 論到出於律法的義，摩西寫著說：“遵行這些事的人就必因這些事而活。”

ccb.text: 关于律法的义，摩西写道：“人若遵行律法的诫命，就必活着。”

csbs.text: 原来，有关出于律法的义，摩西写道：“遵行这些事的人，将因此而活”；
